title: شيخ روحاني بحريني 0096899044920
excerpt: I want to synchronize between crm and some other applications such as Google Sheet

posts.author: shaikh (Sheikh)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to synchronize between crm and some other applications such as Google Sheet

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sheikh!

You can currently import data from Google Sheets, however in terms of syncing between the 2 platforms, this isn’t currently supported. You would need to utilise a third party app such as Zapier to achieve this - Connect your Google Sheets to monday.com integration in 2 minutes | Zapier.

I hope this helps!

posts.author: JoshFromUnito (Hugh Neato)
posts.cookedHtml: Unito (another third party app) has a 2-way Google Sheets integration that’s no-code so you don’t have to learn a scripting language to sync monday tasks to a spreadsheet. You can find Unito on the monday.com marketplace. Here’s a guide on how to set it up in a few minutes.
